_doc: Single source of truth for every periodic puller in the portfolio. Edit and SIGHUP the scheduler to reload (kill -HUP $(cat ~/Documents/scheduler.pid)). Per-job stdout/stderr lands in ~/Documents/scheduler_logs/<name>.log.

jobs.name: t1_nws_actuals
jobs._notes: Iowa State ASOS pull, 7 stations. Replaces the broken com.terminal1.nws-actuals LaunchAgent (exit 78 since 2026-05-01) and the bash-loop nohup workaround.

jobs.name: t3b_nowcast_puller
jobs._notes: DISABLED until the existing nohup loop (started 2026-05-08 15:44 UTC) is killed. Migrate by: pkill -f terminal3b_nowcast_puller, then set enabled=true and SIGHUP the scheduler.

jobs.name: t3b_bls_actuals
jobs._notes: DISABLED until com.t3b.bls-actuals.plist is unloaded. Migrate by: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.t3b.bls-actuals.plist, then set enabled=true and SIGHUP.

jobs.name: t3c_claims_data
jobs._notes: Migrated 2026-05-08 from com.terminal3c.claims-data.plist (was exit=1 — pre-patch FRED UA bug). Unload the plist before relying on this job: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.terminal3c.claims-data.plist

jobs.name: t2_daily_picks
jobs._notes: Migrated 2026-05-08 from com.t2.daily-picks.plist (was exit=78 — TCC bite, never ran successfully). Unload the plist: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.t2.daily-picks.plist. Pipeline is dormant on archetype_calibration anyway (calendar_fade n<3); this just keeps the daily snapshot fresh. | DISABLED 2026-05-09 — T2 archived after 0/8 thesis kill (CoWork diagnosis).

jobs.name: t6_mlb_lines_puller
jobs._notes: T6 sharp Vegas line pull. 90-min cadence stays under Odds API free tier (500 req/mo, 16/day × 30 = 480). DISABLED until Odds API key is set at ~/Documents/.odds_api_key. To enable: (1) get free key at the-odds-api.com, (2) echo KEY > ~/Documents/.odds_api_key, (3) flip enabled=true here, (4) kill -HUP $(cat ~/Documents/scheduler.pid).

jobs.name: entropy_collapse_detector
jobs._notes: Cross-engine informed-flow detector. Reads kalshi snapshot files for T3a/T3b/T3c, computes entropy z-score with within-event rolling baseline + liquidity gate (vol > median × 1.5 AND |z| > 3). Writes alerts to ~/Documents/entropy_alerts.jsonl. Phase 1 use is DEFENSIVE only — traders consult alerts to refuse fading-collapse entries. Phase 2 (after n>=15 calibrated alerts) adds offensive directional entry.
